facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Chen Sea Resort & Spa sits on Bãi Xép, one of Ông Lang's quieter stretches of beach. Minimalist villas, infinity pool, open-air gym, and actual silence. 4.5 stars across 875 reviews. Not a coincidence. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
